mapper.select: select b.id, b.blocker_id, b.blocked_id, b.created_datetime, m.member_name, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, ( select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' order by f.id desc limit 1 ) as profile_image_file_name from tbl_block b join tbl_member m on b.blocked_id = m.id where b.blocker_id = #{memberId} and m.member_status = 'active' order by b.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_block b join tbl_member m on b.blocked_id = m.id where b.blocker_id = #{id} and m.member_status = 'active'
